Together, we can effectively meet industry demands. By collaborating with us, you will be part of a network that ensures steady and rewarding opportunities.
We prioritize maintaining high standards of workforce quality, offering the best matches for your skills and needs.
Let’s join forces to create successful and sustainable employment solutions. Become part of a dynamic and thriving recruitment ecosystem.

glance.title: Arka Hire At a Glance

tabs.label: Short Overview
content: Arka Hire Limited is a leading manpower outsourcing company with over a decade of experience. The company is headquartered in London, UK, to support its international operations and client base.

We specialize in customized manpower management solutions designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our expert team excels at identifying top talent, ensuring a perfect fit for each organization’s specific requirements and budget.

tabs.label: Vision
content: Our vision is to become a trusted global manpower partner, connecting businesses with reliable, skilled, and committed workers across industries.
We aim to build long-term recruitment solutions that support business growth and create meaningful employment opportunities worldwide.

tabs.label: Mission
content: Our mission is to deliver professional manpower outsourcing services through quality recruitment, transparent processes, and continuous support.
We work closely with clients, agencies, and workers to create sustainable staffing solutions that benefit every partner involved.

glance.networkDescription: At Arka Hire, we believe that great achievements are built on strong partnerships. Whether you’re a solo agent or part of an agency, now is the perfect time to collaborate with us and deliver exceptional staffing solutions to clients worldwide.

floatingCard.title: Collaborative Onboarding

ourProcess.title: How We Find the Ideal Match for Your Business
ourProcess.description: Six carefully crafted steps to connect you with the world's best talent — efficiently, reliably, and beautifully.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: Our initial consultation enables us to gain a comprehensive understanding of your specific requirements, allowing us to customize our recruitment approach and identify the most suitable global workers for your business.

stats.title: Over a Decade of Expertise in Manpower Outsourcing
stats.description: Arka Hire is a prominent manpower outsourcing company, headquartered in London, UK. With over a decade of experience, we specialize in providing customized manpower management solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our expert team excels in identifying top talent, ensuring a perfect match for each organization’s specific requirements and budget. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including both temporary and permanent recruitment across various sectors worldwide. Our goal is to be the preferred human resources partner for both public and private sector organizations.

companyTimeline.title: Company Timeline
companyTimeline.subtitle: A decade of growth, innovation, and global impact in workforce solutions.

items.title: Launch and Foundation
items.desc: Arka Hire was founded in the UK, focusing on providing personalized manpower management services and assembling a skilled team to serve initial clients in the construction and manufacturing sectors.

items.title: Service Expansion
items.desc: We broadened our recruitment services to include both temporary and permanent staffing solutions, expanding into warehousing, logistics, and healthcare, thereby growing our client base significantly.

items.title: Industry Diversification
items.desc: We further expanded our offerings into new industries, including retail, hospitality, and IT, allowing us to cater to a wider range of client needs and market demands.

items.title: Global Expansion
items.desc: We enhanced our global presence by entering new international markets, solidifying our reputation as a leading recruitment partner and providing comprehensive manpower solutions worldwide.

heading: Client
Consultation
heroText: At Arka Hire, we recognize that every business has its own set of needs and challenges. Our client consultation services are tailored to provide solutions that are perfectly aligned with your unique requirements and objectives.
With over 10 years of experience in the manpower outsourcing industry, our expert consultants are equipped to offer strategic advice and support to help you achieve your business goals.
points: We design customized strategies to address your specific business challenges.
Our consultants provide informed guidance across sectors including technology, healthcare, and finance.
We leverage the latest technologies to enhance recruitment and HR processes.
We offer comprehensive support from initial consultation to seamless implementation.
Your success is our priority, with clear communication and lasting client relationships.

screeningProcess.heading: Screening Process
screeningProcess.intro: At Arka Hire, our screening process is both thorough and efficient, designed to provide you with reliable, high-quality candidates who meet your specific project needs. Each step is focused on evaluating skills, experience, and compatibility with your requirements. We ensure that every detail is meticulously handled, so you receive the best possible workforce. Our team utilizes advanced tools and methods to ensure an optimal match for your projects. From initial evaluation to final selection, we manage every step of the process to provide you with a workforce you can trust for successful project completion.
points: Detailed Evaluation: We meticulously review skills and experience to match your exact needs
Background Checks: Comprehensive background checks are conducted to ensure reliability.
Skill Tests: Candidates undergo practical skill tests to validate their abilities.
Interviews: We conduct in-depth interviews to assess compatibility and fit with your team.
Your success is our priority, and we maintain clear communication and strong client relationships.

Our dedicated team supports your new employees from day one, ensuring a smooth transition into their roles. employeeWelfareSupport.intro: At Arka Hire, our Employee Welfare Support service is dedicated to ensuring the overall well-being of our workforce. We provide an array of health and wellness initiatives, foster a balanced work-life environment, and offer tailored support services. Our objective is to cultivate a nurturing atmosphere where employees can excel both personally and professionally. From fitness programs and mental health support to adaptable working arrangements and financial planning assistance, we are resolute in meeting the varied needs of our employees.

heroMediation.topDescription: Arka Hire offers mediation services in employment settings to resolve workplace conflicts and improve communication. Our experienced mediators create positive work environments, facilitating mutually beneficial agreements for both employers and employees.
heroMediation.heroTitle: At Arka Hire, we believe that a harmonious workplace is essential for productivity and employee satisfaction.
heroMediation.description: Our mediation services are designed to help resolve conflicts and disputes in a fair, efficient, and confidential manner.
heroMediation.imageCardText: Building better conversations for stronger workplace relationships.

mediationBox.title: What is Mediation?
paragraphs: Mediation is an informal and confidential process where a neutral mediator assists disputing parties in discussing their differences and working toward a mutually acceptable resolution.
The mediator does not make decisions or assign blame but facilitates communication to help the parties find their solutions.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We begin with an initial consultation to assess the nature of the dispute and determine whether mediation is the appropriate approach.
steps.note: This step involves speaking with both parties to explain the process and answer any questions.

steps.title: Agreement to Mediate
steps.description: Both parties must agree to participate in mediation. We provide a written agreement outlining the terms and conditions of the mediation process.

steps.title: Scheduling the Mediation
steps.description: Once both parties agree, we schedule a mediation session at a convenient time and place. Sessions can be conducted in person or virtually, depending on the preferences of the parties involved.

steps.title: Mediation Session
steps.description: During the session, the mediator facilitates a structured discussion, allowing each party to express their views and concerns. The mediator helps identify common ground and explore potential solutions.

heading: Why
should
you
work
with
us?

topCards.title: Reaching an Agreement
topCards.description: If both parties reach an agreement, the mediator assists in drafting a written document that outlines the terms of the resolution. This agreement is binding and enforceable in court.

topCards.title: Follow-Up
topCards.description: We offer follow-up support to ensure the terms of the agreement are implemented and to address any additional concerns that may arise.

whyArkaMediation.title: The Arka Hire Advantage
whyArkaMediation.description: Choosing Arka Hire for your mediation needs means partnering with a team committed to fostering a positive work environment. Our mediators are highly experienced professionals with in-depth knowledge of employment law and conflict resolution. We are dedicated to helping you resolve disputes in a manner that promotes understanding and cooperation.

items.question: What Is Arka Hire Affiliate Program?
items.answer: At Arka Hire, we strive to connect clients with the best employees. We carefully evaluate potential agency partners, ensuring they meet our strict criteria and high standards before establishing collaborations.

items.question: When Can I Send Candidates For An Interview With Arka Hire Consultants?
items.answer: You can send candidates after initial screening and documentation review. Our consultants will guide you through the required steps and interview schedule.

items.question: Who Covers The Cost Of Employment?
items.answer: Employment costs depend on the agreement between the employer, agency partner, and candidate. Our team ensures everything is clearly communicated before proceeding.

items.question: Are There Nationality Requirements For The Arka Hire Affiliate Program?
items.answer: Requirements may vary depending on the client, job role, and destination country. We review every case carefully and provide clear guidance to our partners.

bottomNote.textBeforeEmail: If you have any other questions or need further information, please feel free to contact us at

faqs.question: What types of clients/assignments do you work with?
faqs.answer: At Arka Hire, we work with a diverse range of clients across various industries, including IT, healthcare, finance, engineering, and more. We handle assignments ranging from temporary and contract positions to permanent placements. Whether you need short-term project support or a long-term addition to your team, we can provide the right talent to meet your specific needs.

faqs.question: How long are your typical contracts?
faqs.answer: The duration of our contracts varies based on the specific requirements of our clients and the nature of the assignment. Temporary assignments can range from a few weeks to several months, while contract positions may last from six months to a year or more. Permanent placements are intended to be long-term. We work closely with our clients to determine the appropriate contract length for each assignment.

faqs.question: Why should I work with a staffing agency to find a job?
faqs.answer: Working with a staffing agency like Arka Hire gives you access to unadvertised jobs, expert guidance, career advice, resume reviews, interview preparation, strong employer connections, and flexible job options including temporary, contract, and permanent roles.

faqs.question: How do recruitment agencies work?
faqs.answer: Recruitment agencies serve as intermediaries between employers and job seekers. Our process includes client consultation, candidate sourcing, screening and interviews, client presentation, onboarding, and follow-up to ensure a smooth transition.

faqs.question: What are the fees associated with recruitment services?
faqs.answer: We do not take money from employers for placements. Instead, employers pay a one-time fee to cover the cost of obtaining the necessary work permits from the government. We are transparent about our fees and provide a detailed breakdown during the initial consultation.

faqs.question: Is there an exclusivity clause in the recruitment contracts?
faqs.answer: Exclusivity clauses are optional and depend on the agreement between Arka Hire and the client. Some clients prefer to work exclusively with us, while others may work with multiple agencies. We tailor our approach to your needs.

faqs.question: Is there a deposit to be paid for your services?
faqs.answer: Typically, we do not require a deposit for our recruitment services. Our one-time fee is payable upon the initiation of the work permit process and will be clearly outlined in our agreement.

faqs.question: What is the hiring process like with your agency?
faqs.answer: Our hiring process includes initial consultation, candidate search, screening, shortlisting, client interviews, selection, offer support, and onboarding assistance to ensure smooth integration.

faqs.question: How do you ensure the quality of candidates?
faqs.answer: We use a rigorous screening process including resume review, phone interviews, in-depth face-to-face or virtual interviews, skills testing where needed, reference checks, and continuous feedback from clients and candidates.

faqs.question: How do you handle confidentiality?
faqs.answer: We take confidentiality very seriously. Client and candidate information is handled with the utmost discretion. We follow strict data protection policies and only share information with authorized personnel involved in the recruitment process.

faqs.question: Can you help with international recruitment?
faqs.answer: Yes, Arka Hire can assist with international recruitment. We have a global network and can source candidates from various countries.

faqs.question: What is your policy on diversity and inclusion?
faqs.answer: Arka Hire is committed to promoting diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We believe diverse teams are more innovative and effective. We provide equal opportunities for all candidates and ensure our processes are free from bias.

faqs.question: How do you handle disputes or issues during the recruitment process?
faqs.answer: We have a clear resolution protocol in place. We encourage open communication and work closely with clients and candidates to resolve concerns promptly and fairly.

faqs.question: What support do you offer after a candidate is placed?
faqs.answer: Our support continues after placement. We provide follow-up meetings, performance assessments, and ongoing support to both employers and new hires during the initial employment period.

faqs.question: How do you stay updated with industry trends?
faqs.answer: Our team stays updated through continuous professional development, industry conferences, relevant publications, and insights from a network of industry experts.

faqs.question: Can you provide temporary staffing solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer temporary staffing solutions for short-term support, seasonal workloads, employee absence coverage, and specialized project needs.

faqs.question: How do you match candidates to job roles?
faqs.answer: We match candidates through detailed job analysis, candidate profiling, advanced matching technologies, cultural fit assessment, and long-term potential evaluation.

faqs.question: What is your success rate in placing candidates?
faqs.answer: Our success rate is high due to our rigorous screening process and deep understanding of client needs. We continuously monitor and improve our processes to maintain strong placement results and satisfaction.

sections.title: Subject Matter and Acceptance
sections.content: These Terms of Use (“Terms of Use”) govern the use of the arkahire.com website of Arka Hire. Any person who accesses the Website (“you”) hereby accepts the Terms of Use in force at the time of visiting.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.content: You hereby agree to voluntarily and expressly accept the use of the website solely and exclusively at your own risk. You are responsible for keeping any user ID, password confidential.

sections.title: Content
sections.content: We are not required to verify the accuracy of the Content and we do not warrant the usefulness, accuracy, completeness, or relevance of the Content. All decisions based on content are your responsibility.

sections.title: Intellectual Property Rights
sections.content: All content on the Website is protected worldwide by copyright, design, trademark and other intellectual property laws. You may not copy, redistribute, or use it without permission.

sections.title: Links and Linking
sections.content: The Website may contain links to third-party sites. Linking to such sites does not imply our warranty for those sites. Use is at your own risk.

sections.title: Personal Data
sections.content: Collection and use of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy: https://arkahire.com/privacy-policy

sections.title: Law and Jurisdiction
sections.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of Qatar and are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the court in Doha.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: Questions, comments, and requests related to these Terms can be sent to Arka Hire, Al-Barqiya, Building 379, zone, 57 Street 41, Ar-Rayyan, Qatar, info@arkahire.com

sections.title: Our Privacy Policy
sections.content: We at Arka Hire, located at Al-Barqiya, Building 379, zone, 57 Street 41, Ar-Rayyan, Qatar, aim to protect your privacy. This Policy sets out what personal information we collect from you and how we use it.

sections.title: Personal Information We May Collect
sections.content: We collect information from your visits to the Website, including traffic data, location, and content from contact forms. Mandatory fields are marked with *, and optional fields are your choice.

sections.title: How We Use Your Personal Information
sections.content: We use your data to tailor content, respond to inquiries, provide interactive functions, and improve the website. We retain data typically for 2 years to comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Marketing Messages
sections.content: With your consent, we may send marketing messages via email. You may opt out anytime using the unsubscribe link or contacting info@arkahire.com.

sections.title: Sharing with Third Parties
sections.content: We may disclose data to suppliers, contractors, or government authorities if legally required. All third parties must respect privacy obligations.

sections.title: IP Addresses and Cookies
sections.content: We collect technical data like IP addresses and browser type to improve the site. Cookies are used to provide personalized content. Please do not use 'remember me' on shared devices.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You may access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. You may withdraw consent anytime or lodge a complaint with relevant authorities.

sections.title: Policy Changes
sections.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this website or notified through other channels.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: Questions about this Policy can be sent to Arka Hire at info@arkahire.com.
